meaning: n.(=Babism)泛神教义,波斯神的信徒
examples: They got out of the taxi. Babi pointed "There they are."
Babi was panting too. But his eyes shone with excitement.
For example, Nazi troops murdered 34, 000 Jews at Babi Yar, Ukraine in September 1941.
His mother slipped out of Russia leaving an extended family that was wiped out at Babi Yar.
